title: BPCL Commissions 5MW Green Hydrogen Project in India
content: Indian state-owned oil and gas company Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) has commissioned a 5MW green hydrogen plant at the Bina Refinery in Madhya Pradesh. Representing the companyâ€™s first and one of Indiaâ€™s largest operational hydrogen production projects, the facility is expected to produce over 780 tonnes of hydrogen per year. While details on the initiative are thin, H2 View understands that the plant has been equipped with two 500Nm3 /hr electrolysers. Additionally, the facility was constructed and the electrolysers installed in approximately 15 months
author: Analysts Account
